# KoinKita

KoinKita is an interactive financial education game and web app designed for young people in Indonesia. It teaches financial literacy, budgeting, and investment strategies through engaging mini-games.

## Mini-Games
- [Detektif Cuan](https://koinkita.xyz/): Identify bad financial habits and scams.
- [Koki Anggaran](https://koinkita.xyz/): Manage a monthly budget effectively.
- [Tebak Kata](https://koinkita.xyz/): Learn financial terms in a word-guessing game.
- [Pohon Aset](https://koinkita.xyz/): Grow your virtual assets over time with strategic investments.

## Technical Details
This application is built as a Single Page Application using React and Vite. It heavily utilizes modern web standards.
